Hiring in the United States, overview

high_concern_flags.detail: Chip-nav references Alaska sibling pages (state-income-tax-and-unemployment-insurance, minimum-wage-and-overtime, workers-compensation, new-hire-reporting, employer-registrations, hiring-guide) that don't exist yet; mirrors the Alabama sibling convention. Plain-text rendering used for the United States parent and Alaska state-parent in the links-rail. Retrofit chip-nav anchors when those Alaska children ship in wave 4.

Multi-state-headcount question for the 15-employee Ballot Measure 1 threshold is unsettled in early implementing guidance. Page reads conservatively as 'Alaska employees on the Alaska payroll' and flags this as worth checking with counsel. Carry-over cap also has slight ambiguity in early DOL/state guidance (some described as no annual reset, page reflects the cleaner annual-cap = annual-entitlement reading).
Joanna Castens (Chief Legal Officer) pullquote attribution; /team/joanna-castens/ bio + Person schema not yet shipped. Retrofit Person schema link when bio publishes.
